bucket_allocations.rationale: We've set aside 3 months of your household expenses (₹180,000) in a safe, easily accessible fund. This covers unexpected costs like medical bills or urgent repairs without disrupting your other plans.

Your child's education is due in 12 months, so we're keeping this money in a stable, low-risk fund. This ensures the full ₹300,000 is ready when you need it, without any chance of market swings affecting the amount.

Your home purchase is 5 years away. We're splitting this into 70% growth-focused investments (₹1,750,000) and 30% stable funds (₹750,000). This balanced mix gives your money time to grow while protecting you from big market drops as you get closer to buying.

shortfall.message: Your retirement goal needs ₹20,000,000, but after funding your other priorities, only ₹370,000 is available to invest now. We recommend either increasing your monthly savings, adjusting your retirement timeline, or revisiting your retirement spending plans to close this gap.

bucket_allocations.rationale: With 15 years until retirement, your remaining ₹370,000 is invested for growth across diversified funds. We've included a tax-saving investment (₹50,000) to reduce your tax bill, growth-focused funds (₹196,923), stable bonds (₹87,669), and gold (₹35,808) for safety. However, this amount alone won't reach your ₹20 million target—see the shortfall note above.
